creator: smali@in.oracle.com
text:
Repeatedly Following Error messgae comes on screen
Aug 12 07:31:46 combat250 login: login_getclass: unknown class 'root' 

The messege also comes from inet tftp etc
e.g

Aug 12 07:31:20 combat250 inetd[13193]: login_getclass: unknown class 'root'

How-To-Repeat: 
If you do rlogin from remote user as root. The error occers

Also from console if you login as root error occurs
